steps.title: Use the displayed graph
steps.content:
The graph shown is $y=f(x)+4$. The visible $y$-intercept of that graph is $8$, so
$$
f(0)+4=8
$$
Therefore, $f(0)=4$. This matters because the answer choices define $f$, not the shifted graph.

steps.title: Test the function form
steps.content: Each choice has the form $f(x)=-3^x+c$. Since $3^0=1$: $$ f(0)=-1+c $$ Set this equal to $4$: $$ -1+c=4 $$ So $c=5$, which gives the needed vertical position. The answer is B.
